title: First Busey Corporation and CrossFirst Bankshares, Inc. Announce Shareholder Approvals of Merger
author: N/A
description: First Busey Corporation and CrossFirst Bankshares, Inc. have received shareholder approval for their proposed merger, which is expected to close in the first or second quarter of 2025. The combined entity will create a premier full-service commercial bank with significant scale and enhanced financial capabilities.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights that First Busey shareholders have overwhelmingly approved the merger, indicating their confidence in the strategic and financial benefits of the transaction.
The article states that CrossFirst shareholders have also voted to approve the merger, demonstrating their support for the strategic rationale and financial benefits of the combined entity.

title: Implied Volatility Surging for First Busey (BUSE) Stock Options
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Investors need to pay close attention to First Busey (BUSE) stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

title: First Busey (BUSE) Reports Q1 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: The headline numbers for First Busey (BUSE) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended March 2024, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: First Busey (BUSE) Misses Q1 Earnings Estimates
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: First Busey (BUSE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -4.08% and 1.57%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2024. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: First Busey Corporation Announces 2024 First Quarter Earnings
